message:
refactor(ondisk): remove wrong XOR-based compute_bitmap_checksum

The compute_bitmap_checksum and verify_bitmap_checksum functions used
csum_seed^group (XOR) instead of the correct kernel convention (no
group number at all for bitmap checksums). These were only used in
ondisk tests and the re-export in lib.rs.

Replaced tests with correct ones using block_bitmap_checksum_value
and inode_bitmap_checksum_value, including a test that verifies
different inodes_per_group values produce different checksum lengths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,11 +23,11 @@ pub use ext4::{
     Ext4CompatFeatures, Ext4DirEntry, Ext4DirEntryRef, Ext4DirEntryTail, Ext4DxEntry, Ext4DxRoot,
     Ext4Extent, Ext4ExtentHeader, Ext4ExtentIndex, Ext4FileType, Ext4GroupDesc, Ext4ImageReader,
     Ext4IncompatFeatures, Ext4Inode, Ext4RoCompatFeatures, Ext4Superblock, Ext4Xattr, ExtentTree,
-    FeatureDiagnostics, InodeLocation, compute_bitmap_checksum, dx_hash, ext4_chksum,
+    FeatureDiagnostics, InodeLocation, dx_hash, ext4_chksum,
     iter_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block_casefold, parse_dir_block,
     parse_dx_root, parse_extent_tree, parse_ibody_xattrs, parse_inode_extent_tree,
     parse_xattr_block, stamp_block_bitmap_checksum, stamp_dir_block_checksum,
-    stamp_extent_block_checksum, stamp_inode_bitmap_checksum, verify_bitmap_checksum,
+    stamp_extent_block_checksum, stamp_inode_bitmap_checksum,
     verify_dir_block_checksum, verify_extent_block_checksum, verify_group_desc_checksum,
     verify_inode_checksum,
 };
